nodes.title: (Combine) Main prompt and extra prompt
widgets_values: Change character on image 1 to match character from image 2
Smaller values on Grow Mask lead to stronger effect

Use extra prompt to steer output (refine pose, fix details, etc).

作者的帖子
https://www.reddit.com/r/comfyui/comments/1rung4d/flux2_character_replacer_workflow_new_version_24/

作者的另一个原理帖子
https://www.reddit.com/r/StableDiffusion/comments/1qwpqek/comment/o9ae0fm/


依赖插件

https://github.com/BigStationW/ComfyUI-NAG

nodes.title: Information
widgets_values:
### Tips
For better result try appending style information at pre-processing pose prompt
- Style: photography
- Style: anime/cartoon
- Style: monochrome comics

For example:
```
remove hair, remove clothes and draw this person bald and in skin tone underwear. Style: photography
```

To control head-to-body ratio try adding instructions like
- with small head
- wiht big anime head
